questions.question: Describe the importance of proper waste segregation in the construction industry and explain how it can affect the overall waste management process. (10 marks)

A construction site generates 100 tonnes of waste per month. If the site adopts a segregate, reuse, recycle (SRR) policy, what are the possible benefits and challenges associated with this approach? (15 marks)

If a construction material can be recycled, what are the key factors that should be considered for deciding whether to recycle or reuse the material? Provide two examples of materials that can be recycled and two examples of materials that can be reused. (8 marks)
